tool_args.label: Capital Program Committee Meeting Book - December 2023
tool_args.raw_text: Capital Program Committee Meeting book for December 2023 of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, containing committee actions, meeting minutes, work plan, Bridges & Tunnels update, safety report, capital program status, quarterly traffic light report, and procurements.

payload.title: Capital Program Committee Meeting
payload.description: MTA Capital Program Committee Meeting book containing committee actions summary, minutes, work plan, Bridges & Tunnels update, safety summary, capital program commitments and completions, third quarter 2023 traffic light report, and procurement actions for December 2023.

tool_args.label: Congestion Pricing funding risk from NJ lawsuit
tool_args.raw_text: New Jersey lawsuit puts Congestion Pricing funding at risk; immediate delay of some priority projects including Fulton Line CBTC

payload.claim_text: President Torres-Springer announced immediate delay of some priority projects, including the Fulton Line CBTC project, and indicated that additional key projects across NYCT, LIRR, and Metro-North will be impacted by the lawsuit
payload.subject: Capital Program
payload.description: NJ lawsuit against Congestion Pricing puts $15B in capital funding at risk, causing project delays

tool_args.label: Steel & Concrete Rehabilitation of Bronx & Queens Viaducts at TNB
tool_args.raw_text: Steel & Concrete Rehabilitation of the Bronx & Queens Viaducts at the Throgs Neck Bridge - $187M, Substantially Complete November 2023

payload.project_name: Steel & Concrete Rehabilitation of the Bronx & Queens Viaducts at the Throgs Neck Bridge
payload.description: Over 7,000 steel repairs, painting, concrete pier rehabilitation and replacement of 148 bearings to address state of good repair needs and improve seismic resiliency. Completed in November 2023.

tool_args.label: North Pedestrian Ramp & Harlem River Lift Span Fender Upgrades at RFK
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build project: new bike-ped ramp from RFK Manhattan span to Manhattan Greenway, HRLS fender replacement - $52M, Substantially Complete December 2023

payload.project_name: North Pedestrian Ramp & Harlem River Lift Span Fender Upgrades at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge
payload.description: New bike-ped ramp from RFK Manhattan span to future Manhattan Greenway in East Harlem, replaced HRLS fender protection system meeting current AASHTO guidelines

tool_args.label: Replacement of Tower Elevator Systems at Marine Parkway Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build project: complete replacement of elevator systems in both towers at Marine Parkway Bridge - $22.3M, Substantially Complete December 2023

payload.project_name: Replacement of Tower Elevator Systems at the Marine Parkway Bridge
payload.description: Complete replacement of elevator systems in both towers at the Marine Parkway Bridge

tool_args.label: Cleaning and Painting of Manhattan Plaza and Ramps at RFK
tool_args.raw_text: Cleaning and painting of superstructure steel on the Manhattan Plaza and Ramps - $16.9M, Substantially Complete March 2023 (two months ahead of schedule)

payload.project_name: Cleaning and Painting of the Manhattan Plaza and Ramps at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge
payload.description: Cleaning and painting of superstructure steel on the Manhattan Plaza and Ramps, sealing and painting of concrete pier caps beneath Manhattan spans

tool_args.label: Reconstruction of Randall's Island Ramps at RFK
tool_args.raw_text: Two new vehicular ramps and three new ADA compliant bike-ped paths - $119.4M, approximately 40% complete, completion forecast December 2024

payload.project_name: Reconstruction of the Randall's Island Ramps at the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge
payload.description: Two new vehicular ramps and three new ADA compliant bike-ped paths to replace original deteriorated ramps

tool_args.label: Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation at VNB
tool_args.raw_text: Extend useful life of 56 year old lower-level deck of VNB - $109.6M, approximately 15% complete, completion forecast December 2025

payload.project_name: Lower Level Suspended Span Deck Rehabilitation at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
payload.description: Concrete deck repairs, complete repaving, finger joint rehabilitation, substructure steel repairs, electrical and painting work, weigh in motion system installation

tool_args.label: Webster Avenue Bridge Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build services for replacement of the Webster Avenue Bridge - $10,565,240, 617 Calendar Days

payload.description: Replacement of the Webster Avenue Bridge spanning the LIRR Port Washington Branch in Manhasset, NY. Severely deteriorated and poses safety hazard. Includes removal and disposal of existing bridge, fabrication and installation of new bridge, reconstruction of adjacent roadway, sidewalks, retaining walls, and drainage system.

tool_args.label: ADA Improvements at Broadway Junction Station
tool_args.raw_text: ADA Upgrades and Circulation Improvements at Broadway Junction Complex - $286,131,000 Design-Build contract

payload.project_name: ADA Improvements at Broadway Junction Station Complex
payload.description: ADA upgrades at Broadway Junction Complex including new ADA-compliant elevators, replacing existing escalators, comfort station at Callahan Kelly Playground, and parking lot improvements

tool_args.label: Replacement of Escalators at 6 NYCT Stations
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Replacement of Escalators at NYCT Stations - $145,820,000

payload.project_name: Replacement of Escalators at 6 NYCT Stations
payload.description: Replacement of 21 escalators at 6 stations: 51st Street Station (E,6), High Street Station (A,C), Franklin Avenue Station (S,A,C), Park Place Station (2,3), 21st Street/Queensbridge Station (F), Lexington Avenue/63rd Street Station (F,Q)

tool_args.label: Structural Rehabilitation of RFK Bridge East River Suspended Spans
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Structural Rehabilitation of East River suspended spans and anchorages at RFK Bridge - $409,912,888

payload.project_name: Structural Rehabilitation of the East River Suspended Spans and Anchorages of the Robert F. Kennedy Bridge and new shared-use paths
payload.description: Strengthening cable support structures and anchorages, new shared-use paths between Queens and Wards Island, overcoat painting, seismic retrofits, cable dehumidification, acoustic monitoring, weigh-in-motion system

tool_args.label: Tower Fender Protection and Tower Painting at Throgs Neck Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Tower Fender Protection and Tower Painting at the Throgs Neck Bridge - $153,875,200

payload.project_name: Tower Fender Protection and Tower Painting at the Throgs Neck Bridge
payload.description: Installation of new fire standpipe system, lighting improvements, cleaning and painting of tower interiors, pedestal and strut concrete repairs, replacement of suspender ropes, main cable inspection, rehabilitation of tower elevators

tool_args.label: Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at VNB
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge - $128,525,518

payload.project_name: Tower Painting, Lighting and Electrical Upgrades at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
payload.description: Cleaning and painting of bridge's exterior towers, suspender ropes, and main cable collars; lighting and electrical upgrades including new tower floodlighting, interior lighting, navigation lights, new tower feeder cables, electrical panels, transformers, and seismic retrofit repairs at tower cable bases

tool_args.label: Emergency Alarm Systems at NYCT Stations and Substations
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Emergency Alarm Systems at NYCT stations and substations - $78,755,000

payload.project_name: Emergency Alarm Systems at NYCT Stations and Substations
payload.description: Installation of Emergency Alarm Systems at 31 subway stations and 14 substations; includes pilot project at 5 stations and 1 substation for system upgrades

tool_args.label: Overhaul of Facility Monitoring and Safety Systems at Hugh L. Carey Tunnel and QMT
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services to overhaul and replace facility monitoring and safety systems at Hugh L. Carey Tunnel and Queens Midtown Tunnel - $40,500,000

payload.project_name: Overhaul and Replacement of Facility Monitoring and Safety Systems at Hugh L. Carey Tunnel and Queens Midtown Tunnel
payload.description: Install or upgrade security infrastructure including CCTV, access control, intrusion detection, intercom systems, secondary fire alarm/generator monitoring, real-time digital traffic signs, and power/communications upgrades

tool_args.label: Replacement of Elevators at 17 NYCT Stations
tool_args.raw_text: Design-Build Services for Replacement of Elevators at 17 NYCT Stations - $191,830,000

payload.project_name: Replacement of Elevators at 17 NYCT Stations
payload.description: Replacement of 37 elevators with new ADA-compliant elevators at 17 NYCT stations

tool_args.label: Bridge-Belt Parkway Merge Improvements at VNB
tool_args.raw_text: Bridge-Belt Parkway Merge Improvements at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge - $38.5M, approximately 27% complete

payload.project_name: Bridge-Belt Parkway Merge Improvements at the Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge
payload.description: Eliminate nonstandard center lane merge of Belt/Shore Parkway with VNB Exit Ramp; widen three westbound lanes. Will improve traffic flow, reduce queuing and collisions.

tool_args.label: Structural Rehabilitation/Bike/Pedestrian Path Improvements at Henry Hudson Bridge
tool_args.raw_text: Structural Rehabilitation/Bike/Pedestrian Path Improvements at the Henry Hudson Bridge - $19.8M, Recently Awarded

payload.project_name: Structural Rehabilitation/Bike/Pedestrian Path Improvements at the Henry Hudson Bridge
payload.description: Widening of existing pedestrian path on lower-level span, new ADA-compliant bike/pedestrian connections at Inwood Hill and Spuyten Duyvil ends, abutment and wingwall upgrades for state of good repair and seismic requirements
